project.name: FailMapper Search
project.description: Failure-aware MCTS algorithm kernel (milestone M3): UCB node policy, reward composition, selection/termination policies, state tracking (FaTestState, F9 pattern coverage, I3 branch coverage), strategy selection (D2/D3), action generation (D1), bug classification (D11), predicted-issue matching (D13), best-test update (D14) and verification heuristics (D10/F15), ported from fa_mcts.py / test_state.py / test_generation_strategies.py / verify_bug_with_llm.py. Any code here that looks wrong (non-standard UCB, wins*0.9 decay, confidence decay that gets overwritten) is load-bearing.
